description: woodland, a giant in the outdoor shoe industry, comes up with this rugged shoe with a refined stance. Faux snake hide patterned overlays on the woodsy upper adds a high fashion twist. Crafted with hand-picked Italian leather and soles finished with German technology, your footwear closet is incomplete without a Woodland shoe. Wear this with cargos, chinos or washed denims and a checked casual shirt. Style this with a tonal belt.UpperTwo-tone synthetic upper with leather overlays across the toe box, and rubber overlay on the midfoot Central lace ups Outsole reinforced onto the upper on the heel region with brandingPadded tonguePadded insole for in-step comfortRemovable sockliner to accommodate an orthoticMidsoleRubber midsole for cushioned comfortOutsoleDual density TPU outsole with perforated terraced grooves on the heelGeometric lugs on the forefoot Shoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
